_note: Synthetic vectors authored by the ORACLE method: byte streams are constructed against the Tektelic channel/type TLV wire format for the PELICAN data uplink (fPort 10), documented in reference/decoder_ble_tracker.js (Apache-2.0). Expected outputs are derived from this repo's authored normalization, not copied from upstream. The single upstream TTN example is a fPort 100 BLE-config/register frame (not a data measurement) and is covered as an unsupported-fPort error vector. fPort 10 carries the genuine accelerometer movement alarm (action.motion.detected).

uplink.description: Moving asset: motion alarm set, battery, ambient temperature/humidity, acceleration vector
Stationary asset: motion alarm clear, battery with end-of-service alert set
BLE mode/number-of-devices config frame on fPort 100 (upstream TTN example) is not a data measurement
